questions.question: Explain why the reduction clause requires associative and commutative operations.
expectedPoints: Associative property allows grouping of operations in any order
Commutative property allows changing order of operands
Parallel execution may process elements in different orders
These properties ensure correct results regardless of execution order

questions.question: Compare and contrast the reduction clause with manual reduction implementation using critical sections, discussing performance implications and code complexity.
expectedPoints: Reduction clause: automatic private variable creation
Manual reduction: more flexibility but more complex code
Manual approach: may be needed for custom operations
Performance comparison: reduction generally faster for built-in operations
